assembly.name: 4Axis_RobotArm_Assembly
assembly.summary: 一个包含底座、3个活动关节臂（Link1-3）及集成夹爪的4轴机械臂装配体。底座为长方体带顶部旋转轴；连杆由中间圆柱和两端方块组成，通过侧面销孔配合连接；最上方连杆集成V型夹爪。所有尺寸单位为mm。

global_coordinate_system.x_direction: Forward (aligned with Link1 initial extension direction)
global_coordinate_system.y_direction: Right hand rule relative to X and Z

design_rules: All dimensions in mm, convert to meters for modeling code.
Use nominal dimensions for part modeling; assembly constraints handle fit/clearance.
Links rotate around their respective joint axes.

parts.name: Base
parts.function: Stationary foundation providing vertical rotation axis for Link1.
parts.shape: Rectangular prism 200x200x100mm. Top surface has a two-stage frustum: lower stage D80xH20, upper stage D60xH20. Centered on top is a cylindrical boss D50xH20.
parts.material_or_notes: Default material. Origin at bottom center.

axes.name: main_axis_z
axes.direction_relation: along local Z, passing through center of top boss

assembly_relation_notes: Provides concentric constraint for Link1 via main_axis_z.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Create sketch on XY plane centered at origin: Rectangle 200x200.
Extrude up 100mm to form base body.
On top face (Z=100), create sketch: Circle D80 centered.
Extrude up 20mm.
On new top face (Z=120), create sketch: Circle D60 centered.
Extrude up 20mm.
On new top face (Z=140), create sketch: Circle D50 centered.
Extrude up 20mm to form the final boss.

parts.name: Link1
parts.function: First rotating arm segment connecting Base to Link2.
parts.shape: Central cylinder D50xL150. Two end blocks 60x60x20 attached to cylinder ends. Bottom block has central hole D50. Top block has side pin D10xL20 extending along local Y axis.
key_dimensions: Top Pin: D10, Length 20, Offset from center
parts.material_or_notes: Default material. Local Z along cylinder length.

faces.name: bottom_face_block
faces.purpose: Mating face with Base top boss

axes.name: bottom_hole_axis
axes.direction_relation: along local Z, centered in bottom block

axes.name: top_pin_axis
axes.direction_relation: along local Y, centered in top block side face

assembly_relation_notes: Bottom hole axis coincident with Base main_axis_z.
Bottom face of bottom block coincident with top face of Base boss (or offset by small clearance if needed, here assumed flush for nominal).
Top pin axis will mate with Link2 bottom hole.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Create sketch on XY plane: Circle D50 centered.
Extrude symmetrically or one-way to total length 150mm (e.g., -75 to +75). Let's define local Z as length.
Actually, easier: Sketch on XZ plane? No, standard is XY for cross section. Extrude along Z.
Sketch on XY: Circle D50. Extrude along Z from 0 to 150.
At Z=0 (bottom), create sketch on XY: Square 60x60 centered. Extrude down -20 (or up depending on orientation). Let's say Block is at Z=-20 to 0. So Extrude Cut or Add? Add block below.
Refined: Cylinder Z=0 to 150. Bottom Block Z=-20 to 0. Top Block Z=150 to 170.
Bottom Block: Sketch on XY at Z=0, Square 60x60. Extrude down 20mm.
Top Block: Sketch on XY at Z=150, Square 60x60. Extrude up 20mm.
Bottom Hole: On bottom face of Bottom Block (Z=-20), sketch Circle D50 centered. Extrude cut up 20mm (through block).
Top Pin: On side face of Top Block (e.g., Y+ face at Y=30), sketch Circle D10 centered vertically (Z=160) and horizontally. Extrude out 20mm along +Y.
Apply C2 chamfer to all sharp edges of blocks.

parts.name: Link2
parts.function: Second rotating arm segment connecting Link1 to Link3.
parts.shape: Identical geometry to Link1 but rotated 90 degrees in assembly context. Central cylinder D50xL150. End blocks 60x60x20. Bottom block has side hole D10. Top block has side pin D10.
parts.material_or_notes: Default material. Note: Orientation differs from Link1 in assembly.

faces.name: bottom_side_face
faces.normal_direction_relation: normal -Y (local, assuming hole on Y- side)

faces.name: top_side_face
faces.normal_direction_relation: normal +Y (local, assuming pin on Y+ side)

axes.name: bottom_hole_axis
axes.direction_relation: along local Y, centered in bottom block side

axes.name: top_pin_axis
axes.direction_relation: along local Y, centered in top block side

assembly_relation_notes: Bottom hole axis coincident with Link1 top_pin_axis.
Side face of bottom block coincident with side face of Link1 top block (flush).
Top pin axis will mate with Link3 bottom hole.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Same modeling steps as Link1.
Cylinder Z=0 to 150.
Bottom Block Z=-20 to 0. Top Block Z=150 to 170.
Bottom Hole: On side face (e.g., Y- face at Y=-30) of Bottom Block. Sketch Circle D10 centered at Z=-10 (mid-block height). Extrude cut inward 20mm along +Y.
Top Pin: On side face (e.g., Y+ face at Y=30) of Top Block. Sketch Circle D10 centered at Z=160. Extrude out 20mm along +Y.
Apply C2 chamfer.

parts.name: Link3_Gripper
parts.function: Third arm segment with integrated V-gripper.
parts.shape: Central cylinder D50xL150. Bottom block 60x60x20 with side hole D10. Top block replaced/integrated with V-gripper structure. Gripper is a block 60x60x40 with a V-slot cutout.

axes.name: bottom_hole_axis
axes.direction_relation: along local Y, centered in bottom block side

assembly_relation_notes: Bottom hole axis coincident with Link2 top_pin_axis.
Side face of bottom block coincident with side face of Link2 top block.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Cylinder Z=0 to 150.
Bottom Block Z=-20 to 0. Same as Link2 bottom block.
Bottom Hole: On side face (Y- face) of Bottom Block. Sketch Circle D10 centered at Z=-10. Extrude cut inward 20mm.
Gripper Body: Instead of simple top block, create a block at Z=150 to 190 (Height 40). Size 60x60.
V-Slot: On top face of Gripper Body (Z=190), sketch V-shape. Width 40 at top, depth 20. Extrude cut down 20mm (or through).
Ensure smooth transition from cylinder to gripper body if needed, or just butt joint.
Apply C2 chamfer to bottom block edges.

assembly_sequence: Insert Base and fix to GROUND.
Insert Link1. Constrain bottom_hole_axis to Base.main_axis_z (concentric). Constrain Link1.bottom_face_block to Base.top_face_main (coincident/offset).
Insert Link2. Constrain Link2.bottom_hole_axis to Link1.top_pin_axis (concentric). Constrain Link2.bottom_side_face to Link1.top_block_side_face (coincident).
Insert Link3_Gripper. Constrain Link3.bottom_hole_axis to Link2.top_pin_axis (concentric). Constrain Link3.bottom_side_face to Link2.top_block_side_face (coincident).

constraints.notes: Fix Base to global coordinate system.
Link1 rotates around Base Z axis.
Link1 sits on top of Base boss. Normals oppose.
Link2 side mates with Link1 top block side. Note: Interface naming assumes side face normal opposes the mating face normal.
Link3 side mates with Link2 top block side.
